For FUSE, 
1. Download the latest stable version 2.9.3
2. Untar the directory
#tar -xzvf fuse-xxx.tar.gz
3. Make and install
#./configure
#make
#make install 

3. Install Python binding
3.1 Clone the source git repository
#git clone https://github.com/terencehonles/fusepy.git
3.2 #./setup.sh install

!!! Do not use sudo pip install fusepy as that gives you the old version

4. Install Binary data parser
#sudo pip install construct
